evals.name: vote-command-abstain-on-own-findings
evals.prompt: Use the review-forge skill: vote feature: demo model: gemini-3.5. The repo has .review/demo/summary.md with synthesized findings.
evals.expected_output: Creates exactly .review/demo/gemini-3.5-vote.md with one vote per finding using enums confirm/dispute/unsure/abstain; abstains on RF-002 and RF-004 (sources include gemini-3.5); votes with code evidence on RF-001 and RF-003; does not modify summary.md, product code, or other files.
assertions: Creates .review/demo/gemini-3.5-vote.md and no other new or modified files
Votes abstain on RF-002 and RF-004 because their sources include gemini-3.5
Casts a non-abstain vote (confirm, dispute, or unsure) on RF-001 and RF-003
Every confirm or dispute vote cites code or diff evidence
summary.md and src/cart.js are byte-identical to the fixture

evals.name: report-command-weighted-confidence
evals.prompt: Use the review-forge skill: report feature: demo model_weights: gpt-5.5: 1.5. The repo has .review/demo/ with summary.md and three vote files.
evals.expected_output: Creates .review/demo/final-report.md ordered by severity then confidence score. RF-001 score 1.0 high; RF-002 score 0.2 low; RF-003 score 1.0 high; RF-004 unvoted. All checkboxes unchecked. Records resolved model weights and per-model votes. Does not modify summary.md or vote files.
assertions: Creates .review/demo/final-report.md and no other new or modified files
RF-001 confidence_score is 1.0 with confidence high (confirm opus-4.6 1.0 + gemini-3.5 1.0, gpt-5.5 abstained)
RF-002 confidence_score is 0.2 with confidence low (dispute gpt-5.5 weight 1.5, unsure opus-4.6 counts 0.5)
RF-003 confidence_score is 1.0 with confidence high (only gemini-3.5 eligible, voted confirm)
RF-004 confidence is unvoted because all three models abstained
Findings ordered RF-001, RF-003, RF-002, RF-004 (severity first, then score; unvoted last)
Resolved model weights recorded including gpt-5.5: 1.5
